error_signature: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 403
title: 403 error during multi-step authentication login
symptom: Users receive a 403 error when attempting to log in with multi-step authentication, despite entering the correct code.
not_this_if: Error occurs without using multi-step authentication
root_cause: The 403 error indicates that the server is refusing to fulfill the request, often due to authentication issues. In this case, a time mismatch between the user's device and the server can cause the authentication code to be deemed invalid.
fix_steps: Check the time settings on your phone and PC
Ensure both devices are set to the correct time zone
Sync the clocks if they are mismatched
Attempt to log in again with the authenticator code
agent_instruction: Sync the time on your phone and PC to resolve the 403 error during login.
